arts.ttl: Player ‘looks set to stay’ at Blackburn Rovers – Snubs 3 clubs, and wants Rovers future
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers’ Arnór Sigurðsson has less than six months left on his contract and his long-term future at Ewood Park remains uncertain. According to Sweden’s Fotbollskanalen, Djurgården, IFK Norrköping and Malmö FF are all looking to sign the winger in the winter market.
